name: gatoway
description: Gatoway workspace root: the Gatoway core communications hub and the Stream Deck plugin that spawns and drives it.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=gatoway-core && npm run build --workspace=stream-deck-plugin
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=gatoway-core && npm run test --workspace=stream-deck-plugin
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=gatoway-core && npm run typecheck --workspace=stream-deck-plugin
